docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76767563) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTH LIGHT SPECIALTY INSURANCE COMPANY A/S/O SAMSON CHU AS TO DEFENDANT CARPENTER, DALLAS CECILE MOBILITY EXPRESS MEDICAL TRANSPORTATION, LLC DOES 1-15 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-03-2025 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-29-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-10-2025
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-03-2025 CONTINUED TO FEB-04-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-10-2026 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-04-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-10-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 78441403)
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 76767563) TO PLAINTIFF NORTH LIGHT SPECIALTY INSURANCE COMPANY A/S/O SAMSON CHU
